artPrompt: A cramped subterranean vault buried far beneath the town, sagging shelves and stacked coin-trays lit by a single hanging amber bulb, a hunched goblin clerk's silhouette licking a thumb at a worn ledger; ink-black tunnels and smoky brown gloom swallow the low brick ceiling, the secret counting-house breathing a damp, melancholic hush, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Underworld Counting House
text:
When Underworld Counting House enters the battlefield, you create a Favor token, then you lose 1 life. Setup costs.
{T}: Add {B}.
{4}, {T}: Draw a card, then you lose 1 life. The lamp burns all night. The numbers never sleep. Neither do the goblins who guard them.
flavorText: Beneath the town, beneath the sewers, beneath even that, a goblin licks his thumb and turns a page.
